author: fl-sean03
title: compute_structure_context AttributeError on missing zone_map key
notes: Bug does not exist. FileZoneMap.get() (zones.py:147) returns Zone.PRODUCTION as a default when the key is missing — it never returns None. The submitter assumed dict.get() semantics (returns None on miss), but FileZoneMap.get() wraps self._map.get(path, Zone.PRODUCTION). Therefore .value always succeeds and no AttributeError can occur.
